description: Create a parallax scrolling animation using the assets at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/inputs/foreground.png' (Green) and '/home/ga/OpenToonz/inputs/background.png' (Red). The animation must be at least 24 frames long with both objects moving horizontally. Ensure the foreground moves at least twice as fast as the background to create a depth effect. Render the sequence as PNG files to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/parallax/'.
